title: Mildly Spicy Spanish Chicken Roast
description: A savory Spanish dish featuring chilli bean paste, perfect for a date night, this roast is low in fat and full of flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together chilli bean paste, olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Place the chicken thighs in a large bowl and brush the chilli bean paste mixture evenly over both sides of the chicken.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray, then arrange the chicken thighs on the baking sheet.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
After 30 minutes, brush the chicken with lemon juice and continue roasting for an additional 15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
